page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: BUDT7581 or BUDT742.

Formerly: BUDT758I.

BUDT748 Industry Practicum (3 Credits)

This capstone course will provide students an opportunity to work ona real-world project where they will work with a company to use technology to solve a business problem.

Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H Smith School of Business.
